summary: Excellent audience tape captures an outstanding Greek Theatre show with smoking China>Rider, Eyes of the World and Estimated Prophet.
review: The recording is widely praised as one of the best audience tapes of ’83 – crisp, immersive and practically flawless.  The performance itself is described as stellar, with first‑set gems like Birdsong and Let It Grow and a second‑set pre‑drums stretch that shines on China Cat Sunflower > Rider, Eyes of the World and Estimated Prophet.

ai_rating.rationale: All seven reviews are glowing (4‑5 stars), consistently highlighting superb sound quality and an inspired performance; the weight of evidence yields a top‑tier rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers call it the best or one of the best audience tapes, noting crystal‑clear detail and no noticeable flaws.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > The Other One
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for strong highlights (Birdsong, Let It Grow); second‑set pre‑drums segment flows beautifully with China Cat Sunflower > Rider and a powerful Eyes of the World leading into an inspiring drum/space section.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bob (Bobby) is noted for fixing his guitar during the China Cat intro, showing his engagement with the crowd.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drum segment receives enthusiastic praise, described as funny, powerful and a highlight of the show.
